    meta:

        description = "Detection for Exploit for CVE-2026-12432 exploit"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-06-28"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-12432" ascii wide nocase

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 120 threat advisories. Of these, 11 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 44 as HIGH risk. 0 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-INGEST. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
